Engraved Velium Spear  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 21
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 11
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 2.8 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

attnas

▲ Page top
RE: yup
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 11:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758234951
Scholar
26 posts
Actually DN is not that difficult to get to, and you can take most of the common mobs in the first part of the zone with a single group if you know what you're doing. But yes, a lot of the items in this zone appear to be rare as hell... for instance, a monk friend of mine has killed about 60 Phase Spiders hoping for a carapice and hasn't seen one drop yet. Kind of reminds me of CoM... you can get a wu's stick if you kill things near the zone long enough, but there pretty rare. It's a lot faster to get a couple groups together, move in deeper, and grab some of the items the Lords drop.
▲ Page top
whatever
QuoteReply
# May 08 2001 at 6:41 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Anything in Necroplolis is pretty much common, they have random drops off most mobs. You should see the other rogue items that come out of this place. 12/20 Exquisite Velium Spear would be one :)
